---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-05-19T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
key: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
state: active
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - roadmap
  - option-c
  - meta
title: "roadmap: full toolchain (option C — design milestones 2–6 + cross-cutting)"
type: task
graph_entity_type: roadmap
---

# full toolchain roadmap (option C)

## purpose

this file is the **parent-repo index** for the complete implementation surface described in the [sv0 compiler vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html): from self-hosting preparation through LLVM, static verification, kernel support, macros, literate sources, rich `std`/`crypto`, and packaging.

use it to:

- see **which task file owns** each design milestone slice
- **order work** (dependencies and suggested sequencing)
- **refine acceptance criteria** as the design and implementation learn from each other

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: SV0_MCP_ROOT=sv0-mcp
/env: DESIGN_DOC_URL=http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html

## verify roadmap artifacts

/run: 01-verify-roadmap-artifacts.sh

## design milestone → repo task files

| design milestone (vision doc) | primary repo task(s) | notes |
|--------------------------------|------------------------|--------|
| 0 — language specification (prose + agreed roadmap) | design HTML; `task/sv0doc-milestone-0.Rmd` (extracted formal spec) | normative extracted spec lives in **sv0doc/** |
| 1 — bootstrap compiler (SML) | `task/sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd` | C backend; state tracked in that file |
| 2 — self-hosting **preparation** | `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd` (VM slice) + `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd` (fmt, doc, test harness, `lib/` bootstrap seeds) | two files on purpose: VM is deep; prep is cross-cutting |
| 3 — self-hosting compiler | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd` | compiler in sv0; bootstrap SML archived |
| 4 — advanced verification | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-4-verification.Rmd` | SMT, refinement types, `sv0 verify` |
| 5 — LLVM + production crypto | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-5-llvm-crypto.Rmd` | LLVM IR backend + crypto library hardening |
| 6 — kernel development | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-6-kernel.Rmd` | `asm!`, boot/link, HAL, minimal kernel |
| (cross-cutting, multi-milestone) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting.Rmd` | macros, `.sv0.md` literate, `std`/concurrency, packaging |
| developer graph + MCP | `task/sv0-mcp-milestone-0.Rmd` | supports all phases; not a language milestone |

## dependency graph (high level)

```
sv0doc (spec) ──> sv0c (SML) ──> sv0vm (bytecode)
                    │
                    ├── milestone-2-prep (tooling + lib/ bootstrap seeds)
                    │
                    v
            self-host (milestone 3)
                    │
        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
        v           v           v
 verification   llvm/crypto   kernel
    (4)            (5)          (6)
        └───────────┴───────────┘
              cross-cutting (macros, literate, std, packages)
```

## refinement protocol (living plan)

**sources of truth**

1. **Language vision and examples** — design HTML (and any successor doc). Major semantic or syntax shifts start here.
2. **Implementable specification** — **sv0doc/** (grammar, types, contracts, memory model, bytecode when specified there). Compiler and VM must align with this when building production behavior.
3. **Milestone acceptance criteria** — each `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-*.Rmd` and submodule milestone. Update these when scope or order changes.

**how to refine during implementation**

- When you change the **design**, note the implication in the relevant milestone file (deliverables, `/ai:` prompts, or a short “decision log” subsection in markdown).
- When you discover **spec gaps**, prefer a **sv0doc** change plus a one-line pointer from the milestone that depended on the gap.
- When a milestone grows too large, **split** it: add `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-N-<topic>.Rmd` and `/include:` it from the parent milestone (same pattern as `sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd`).

**YAML `state` convention** (optional but recommended)

- `draft` — scope or criteria not frozen
- `active` — in progress
- `complete` — criteria met; keep file for history
- `superseded` — replaced by another task id; link to successor in the body

**graph sync (sv0-mcp)**

- `graph_entity_type: roadmap` on this file — Neo4j node label `Roadmap` (not inferred from the key).
- `roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full` on child milestone tasks — creates `PART_OF` edges into this roadmap for `sv0://roadmaps` and `get_roadmap_children`.
- After you change **task/** milestones, **sv0doc** normative files, or major **sv0c** / **sv0vm** layout, refresh the graph: from **sv0-mcp**, `./scripts/sync-graph.sh all` (or `uv run sv0-mcp sync --scope all`). Cursor agents can also call the **sv0-graph** MCP tool **`sync_graph`** with scope **`all`**. **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** so common YAML typos in **`task/*.Rmd`** (missing space after **`:`**) fail before a bad sync. For a **fast Python-only** pass (block comments, **sv0doc** baseline, task YAML) without **SML**, use **`./scripts/sv0 test-guards`** or **`make test-guards`**.

## milestones 0–3 — progress snapshot

This is a human-readable summary; detailed criteria stay in each **`task/sv0-*-milestone-*.Rmd`**.

| Design milestone | Status (high level) | What “done” means today |
|------------------|---------------------|-------------------------|
| **0** — language spec | **Baseline met** | **sv0doc** holds grammar, types, contracts, memory model, keywords, and **bytecode anchor** docs under **`bytecode/`**. Parent **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **`verify_sv0doc_baseline.py`** so required paths cannot disappear silently. Normative prose can still evolve. |
| **1** — SML bootstrap compiler | **Met** | **sv0c** lexer through C backend; unit + integration tests green under **`./scripts/sv0 test`**. |
| **2** — self-host prep | **Met** (split: VM vs prep) | **sv0vm** runs bytecode; **sv0c** emits **`.sv0b`**. Prep slice: **`sv0 test`** (includes **sv0doc** baseline, block-comment guard, **`task/*.Rmd`** YAML lint, **stage0** golden C for listed seeds, doctests), **`sv0 test-guards`** / **`make test-guards`** for the same three Python checks without **SML**, **fmt**, **doc**, **bootstrap-in-sv0** programs. |
| **3** — self-hosting compiler | **Not met** | **Bar (see `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`):** **sv0** at **feature parity** with SML; **VM** fully functional; **strict** bytecode vs SML on a **curated ~50–100** program suite (allowlist only); diagnostics **behavioral** first, **tighten to strict**. **Retirement:** tag **`bootstrap-sml-final`** (**sv0c** repo only), **`sv0c/sml/`** → **`sml-legacy/`**, default build **sv0-only**. Today: seeds only; SML still authoritative. |

**Finishing milestone 3** requires **compiler transliteration and a bootstrap recipe**, not only docs or tests. Use **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`** (“remaining work vs definition of done”) for the live checklist; **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`** (“quick start”) for the unified test entry.

## suggested implementation order

1. close **VM + integration parity** (`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`) — **complete**
2. advance **prep** tooling and **`lib/`** bootstrap seeds (`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`) — **complete**
3. **self-hosting** (`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`)
4. parallel tracks as staffing allows: **verification** (4), **cross-cutting** items that unblock macros/tests, **MCP** polish
5. **LLVM + crypto** (5), then **kernel** (6)

/ai: when the design doc gains a new numbered milestone or renames scope, update this file’s mapping table and the affected child milestone Rmd files in the same change set.
